import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let all = io.read_to_end()
  let lines = string.split(all, "\n")
  mut i = 0
  mut num = 1
  while i < lines.len()
    let line = match lines.get(i)
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      ""
    end
    if i == lines.len() - 1 and string.is_empty(line)
      i = i + 1
    else
      print("#{num}: #{line}")
      num = num + 1
      i = i + 1
    end
  end
  Ok(())
end
